titleEn: From overlap to precision: How a retrofit autosteer system changed life on the farm
titleZh: 从重叠到精准：一套后装自动转向系统如何改变农场生活
summaryZh: 荷兰农业企业Van den Borne Voerman的农场主Frans van den Borne三年前首次购买了一套CHCNAV NX510后装自动转向系统，从最初在主力拖拉机上试用，到如今四台芬特拖拉机全部配备。该系统以远低于Trimble的价格实现了精准导航，显著减少了作业重叠和燃油消耗，彻底改变了农场作业方式。文章通过真实案例展示了后装自动转向系统的成本效益和实操价值，为种植业者提供了可借鉴的升级路径。
featuredReason: 本文通过真实农场案例展示了低成本后装自动转向系统的实际效果，为智慧种植领域的从业者提供了可落地的技术升级参考，尤其适合关注精准农业和成本控制的农场主。
contentFull: From overlap to precision: How a retrofit autosteer system changed life on the farm 03-06 | Autonomous/semi-autosteering systems | ArticleLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintFrans uses the autopilots on four Fendt tractors. Life on the farm has changed considerably. Photos: Bert JansenFrans van den Borne of Dutch agricultural business Van den Borne Voerman in Hooge Mierde purchased his first retrofit autosteer system 3 years ago: a CHCNAV NX510. “We’d been talking about it for a while”, says Frans. “But I found the price of something like a Trimble quite high. Then I came across the CHCNAV autosteer system.” He decided to take a cautious approach, first trying the system on the tractor that was being used most at the time. “We had been talking about it for a whLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint René Groeneveld Correspondent for AustraliaMore aboutautomated steering systemsautosteerfarm managementfuelretrofit kitsadLEARN MORERelated articles02-07 | NewsSabanto and Verdant Robotics integrate autonomy and precision application systems02-07 | NewsTersus GNSS AG993: Modular autosteer kit with built-in satellite correction fallback18-06 | NewsCroplands expands WEED-IT range with new releases, including orchard solution21-05 | NewsTerraGrid monitors RTK signal and warns of disruptions Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
荷兰Hooge Mierde的农业企业Van den Borne Voerman的Frans van den Borne在三年前购买了他的第一套后装自动转向系统：一套CHCNAV NX510。

“我们讨论这件事已经有一段时间了，”Frans说。“但我发现像Trimble这样的产品价格相当高。后来我偶然看到了CHCNAV的自动转向系统。”他决定采取谨慎的态度，首先在当时的常用拖拉机上试用该系统。

“我们讨论这件事已经有一段时间了，”Frans说。“但我发现像Trimble这样的产品价格相当高。后来我偶然看到了CHCNAV的自动转向系统。”他决定采取谨慎的态度，首先在当时的常用拖拉机上试用该系统。
author: René Groeneveld
contentHtml: Frans van den Borne of Dutch agricultural business Van den Borne Voerman in Hooge Mierde purchased his first retrofit autosteer system three years ago: a CHCNAV NX510. “We’d been talking about it for a while”, says Frans. “But I found the price of something like a Trimble quite high. Then I came across the CHCNAV autosteer system.”
